title: Set Socket label for contianer
body:
This will allow container processes to write to the CRIU socket that gets injected
into the container.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/1891
@adrianreber Could you build this and test it out to see if it eliminates the SELinux issues?
@rhatdan Sure, will do that today and report back here.
Change LGTM, but test don't look happy.
@rhatdan: Perfect, thanks a lot for this! This fixes checkpoint/restore on F28 and F29 on my test VMs.
Please review the selinux PR so we can get this done. @giuseppe

@mheon @TomSweeneyRedHat @umohnani8 @vrothberg @giuseppe @baude PTAL

This should be ready to merge now, since the SELinux patch got accepted upstream.
I restarted the F29 job. Looks like the RH registry was unreachable for a short time.
LGTM and happy green test buttons.
